steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The contrast “Though copies were originally distributed ______, the game is now readily available online” signals that the original distribution was the opposite of readily available — it was hidden or covert. The blank needs a word meaning secretly or stealthily.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — dispassionately: Means without strong emotion or bias. This describes an attitude or tone, not a method of distribution. ✗
  • Choice B — disingenuously: Means dishonestly or insincerely. This describes intent behind speech, not how physical copies were shared in secret. ✗
  • Choice C — surreptitiously: Means in a secret or stealthy way. Underground political protest material in an authoritarian state would be passed around covertly, which directly contrasts with being “readily available online.” ✓
  • Choice D — succinctly: Means briefly or concisely. This describes length or brevity of expression, not how copies were distributed. ✗
That matches Choice C — surreptitiously.
